verses.text: Tua ciangin a thahat vantung mi khat, meiipi in tuamin, a lu tungah sakhituihup khimin, a maitang nitaang tawh kibangin, a khete meikuang khuampi tawh a kibang khat, vantung panin a hong kumsuk ka mu hi
A khutsungah laizial neu khat phelsa-in a tawi hi. A taklam khe in tuipi sung sikin, a veilam khe in leitung sik a
nakpi takin kiko ahih manin humpinelkai hawk tawh a kibang hi. Tua bangin a kiko ciangin van sagih a gingte in a dawng hi

Tua van sagih a gingte' thugen a mankhit phetin tua a thugente lai-ah a gelh dingin ka kithawi hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin awging khat ka za a, “Tua thute lai-ah gelh kei in la, tua van sagih a gingte' thugen imcip in,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin tuipi leh leitung kalkakin a ding ka muh vantung mi in vantung lamah a taklam khut lamto-in
a nungta tawntung, vantung leh a sunga om khempeuh, leitung leh a sunga om khempeuh, leh tuipi leh a sunga om khempeuh a bawl Pasian' min tawh kiciam a, “Tu-in zekai nawn hetlo ding hi
A sagihna vantung mi in a peengkul a tum ciangin ama nasem kamsangte tungah a gensa bangin Pasian in ama ip thusim a geelte hong semkhia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin vantung panin awging ka zak in kei kiangah thu hong genkik a, “Tuipi leh leitung kalkakin a ding vantung mi' khutsungah a om laizial kiphelsa pen va la in,” hong ci hi

Tua ahih manin vantung mi kiangah va pai-in tua laizial neu a hong piakna dingin ka va gen leh amah in, “La in la, ne in. Na gil sung a tun' ciangin thuk mahmah ding a, ahi zongin na kam sungah khuaizu bangin khum mahmah ding hi,” hong ci hi
Kei zong tua vantung mi' khutsung panin a laizial neu la-in ka ne hi. Ka kamah khuaizu bangin khum dekdak a, ahi zongin ka nekkhit ciangin ka gil sung thuk velvalsak hi
Tua ciangin keima kiangah, “Minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zangte leh kumpite tungah a piang ding thu na gen ding kisam lai hi,” hong kici hi.
